visualizations.title: Improper Fraction Definition
visualizations.description: The formal definition of an improper fraction showing the numerator-denominator relationship.

steps.explanation: Condition for improper fraction: The numerator is greater than or equal to the denominator.
Since we have at least as many parts as a single whole, the total value is 1 or more.

visualizations.title: Visualizing 5/4 with Dual Circle Models
visualizations.description: Watch how 5 quarter segments are filled across two distinct whole units, demonstrating a value greater than 1.
